html:
Exclusive to:  

The Sextant can be snagged from Flotsam by using a Fishing Rod. It can be given to the Pig King for two Gold Nuggets. When given a Sextant, Wolly will drop two Red Gems and a Crimson Feather, tell a part of Wolly's Riddle, then fly away.

×2

Trinket 20

Exclusive to:  

In the Shipwrecked DLC, an item with the same appearance can be captured in Trawl Net. Despite having the same appearance, they are actually two different items, they cannot be stacked, and they function and acquire differently.

In the Hamlet DLC, the Old Boot can spawn in a Bandit Stash.

×9

×11

×3


Gallery

  • Sextant card from Wolly's Riddle.

Exclusive to:
“An instrument of some sort.”
–Wilson
“I can't say that word!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang loves these!”
–Wolfgang
“I just use it as a paperweight.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE NO TROUBLE TAKING PRECISE MEASUREMENTS”
–WX-78
“A device for taking measurements.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a little too fancy for my liking.”
–Woodie
“Exactly what it looks like. Err... What does it look like?”
–Maxwell
“Ah! A reflecting navigation instrument!”
–Wagstaff
“Some kind of crude weapon?”
–Wigfrid
“It's very shiny.”
–Webber
“I have no idea how to use that.”
–Walani
“Excuse me?”
–Warly
“A captain worth his salt don't need this.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA UNDERSTAND IT NAUGHT”
–Wilba
“Pretty machine”
–Wormwood

In the Shipwrecked DLC, an item with the same appearance can be captured in Trawl Net. Despite having the same appearance, they are actually two different items, they cannot be stacked, and they function and acquire differently.
In the Hamlet DLC, the Old Boot can spawn in a Bandit Stash.

The '''Sextant''' can be snagged from [[Flotsam]] by using a [[Fishing Rod]]. It can be given to the [[Pig King]] for two [[Gold Nugget|Gold Nuggets.]] When given a Sextant, [[Sunken Boat|Wolly]] will drop two [[Gems|Red Gems]] and a [[Feather|Crimson Feather]], tell a part of [[Wolly's Riddle]], then fly away. 

{{Recipe
|item1 = Sextant
|gold = yes
|result = Gold Nugget
|resultcount = 2
}}
{{clear}}

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, an item with the same appearance can be captured in [[Trawl Net]]. Despite having the same appearance, they are actually two different items, they cannot be stacked, and they function and acquire differently.

In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC,  the Old Boot can spawn in a [[Secret Bandit Camp|Bandit Stash]]. 

{{Recipe
|item1 = Sextant
|gold = yes
|result = Gold Nugget
|resultcount = 9
}}
{{Recipe
|item = Sextant
|dubloon = yes
|result = Dubloons
|resultcount = 11
|dlc = Shipwrecked
}}
{{Recipe
|item = Sextant
|tool = Pig Collector
|result = Oinc
|resultcount = 3
|dlc = Hamlet
}}
